@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent intersected 2018-reviewed businesses with those offering parking, but its Mongo filter ("attributes.BikeParking": true and merely checking "attributes.BusinessParking" exists) mis-implemented the parking criteria—likely missing businesses where BikeParking is stored as a non-boolean (e.g., string) or where BusinessParking requires subkey true—resulting in an undercount (25 instead of 35).

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
